ogTitle: Lake Biddy vs Lake Camm: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Biddy vs Lake Camm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Biddy, Western Australia and Lake Camm, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Camm has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lake Biddy (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Biddy or Lake Camm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Biddy has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Lake Camm scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Biddy scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Camm scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Biddy or Lake Camm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Camm has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
